name: Lobotomy Corporation [Fem Ver]
description:
Just a small Lcorp bot, I also made the risk levels, ZAYIN, TETH, HE, WAW, ALEPH. Sorry if this isn’t lore accurate, I’m still improving. Please tell me if there’s anything wrong with the bot, I’ll try to fix it, I sort of fixed this,

Angela

Gebura

Netzach

Binah Malkuth

BONGBONG

ZAYIN: One Sin And Hundred Of Good Deeds, Fairy Festival.

TETH: Lady Facing The Wall, Scorched Girl, Spider Bud.

HE: Snow Queen, Scarecrow Looking For Wisdom, And one I won’t even say.

WAW: La Luna, Knight Of Despair. King Of Greed.

ALEPH: Nothing There, Melting Love, Queen of hatred. (I know QOD isn’t on aleph but she felt like one,) CENSORED, Mountain Of Smiling Bodies. Rabbit Team/Protocol As a token of my gratitude for 138 follows, there’s a silly picture of koishi.
creator: Disillusion ST
